weeklyFocus.headline: iPhone 17 Launch + Better Value Push + HINT Month On Us
weeklyFocus.context: iPhone 17 lineup just dropped — iPhone 17 On Us for switchers (no trade-in), iPhone 17 Pro under $100 for switchers. Galaxy S26 Ultra still On Us with new line on Experience Beyond. Better Value plan is the new value play — 3 lines for $140/mo with Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+, T-Satellite. Home Internet Month On Us promo code MONTHONUS + up to $300 back via prepaid card. Push HINT on EVERY call.

trending.buzz: iPhone 17 On Us — no trade-in needed
trending.source: T-Mobile.com hero banner, TV ads, social
trending.repTip: Switchers on Experience Beyond or Better Value (3 lines). No trade-in required. Via 24 monthly bill credits. Port from AT&T, Verizon, Claro, UScellular, Xfinity, Spectrum, Liberty PR.
On Us when you switch on Experience Beyond or Better Value — no trade-in needed. Thinnest iPhone ever. Great upsell from 17e.

T-Satellite isn't just texting anymore — WhatsApp, AllTrails, and more Apple/Google apps now work via satellite. Included on Experience Beyond or $10/mo add-on. Huge differentiator — nobody else has this.

trending.buzz: Pixel 10a + Pixel Buds 2a both On Us
trending.repTip: New line on most plans ($60+/mo). Pixel Buds 2a free via instant discount in same transaction. Great budget-friendly bundle.

trending.buzz: Galaxy Z Flip7 & Z Fold7 deals
trending.repTip: Z Flip7 On Us with any-condition trade on Experience Beyond. Z Fold7 up to $1,300 off with new line on Experience Beyond. Foldables are the conversation starter.

trending.buzz: T-Mobile families saved $3,700 vs AT&T & Verizon over 5 years
trending.source: HarrisX Billing Snapshots, T-Mobile ads everywhere
trending.repTip: With 3+ lines. Based on actual bills, not theoretical pricing. Great closer when someone says 'I'm happy with my current carrier.'

currentPromos.name: iPhone 17 On Us (Switchers)
currentPromos.details: iPhone 17 free — no trade-in needed. Via 24 monthly bill credits when you switch to T-Mobile and port your number on Experience Beyond ($100+/mo w/ AutoPay) or Better Value (3 lines $140+/mo w/ AutoPay). Port from AT&T, Verizon, Claro, UScellular, Xfinity, Spectrum, Liberty PR. Up to $1,000 off. Max 4 devices/account. $35 device connection charge.

commonObjections.objection: I don't want to commit to 24 months of bill credits
commonObjections.response: There's no contract — you're free to leave anytime. The credits just offset the device cost monthly. Most people stay because the plan value is unbeatable. And if you do leave, you just pay the remaining device balance.

commonObjections.objection: I'm not sure I want to switch carriers
commonObjections.response: Totally get it. But right now you're getting a free iPhone 17 just for bringing your number over — no trade-in, no hoops. Plus T-Mobile families save $3,700 over 5 years vs AT&T and Verizon. And we'll even pay off your old phone up to $800.

commonObjections.objection: What about my current phone payment?
commonObjections.response: We'll pay that off — up to $800 per line via a virtual prepaid Mastercard, typically within 15 days. You trade in the old device, we handle the rest.

currentPromos.name: iPhone 17 Pro Under $100 (Switchers)
currentPromos.details: iPhone 17 Pro for under $100 when you switch on Experience Beyond or Better Value. No trade-in needed. Via 24 monthly bill credits. Same port-in requirements as iPhone 17 On Us.

commonObjections.objection: Under $100 sounds too good — what's the catch?
commonObjections.response: No catch. You pay the tax upfront on the full price, then get bill credits every month that cover nearly all of the device cost. After 24 months, you've paid under $100 total for the phone.

currentPromos.name: iPhone 17 On Us (Existing — Trade-In)
currentPromos.details: Existing customers: iPhone 17 On Us when you trade in an eligible device on Experience More ($85+/mo) or Go5G Plus. Up to $830 via 24 monthly bill credits. Trade-in tiers: iPhone 13 Pro = $830 credit, iPhone 11 = $400 credit. Max 2 devices/account.

commonObjections.response: That's actually perfect — a working phone means higher trade-in value. And the longer you wait, the less it's worth. Right now your trade gets you a brand new iPhone 17 essentially free.

currentPromos.name: iPhone 17e On Us (Switchers)
currentPromos.details: Free when you switch and port your number on most plans ($45+/mo w/ AutoPay). No trade-in needed. Up to $630 via 24 monthly bill credits. Works on Essentials and above. Max 4 devices/account. Great entry-level iPhone with all-day battery.

commonObjections.objection: Is the 17e any good compared to the regular 17?
commonObjections.response: It's Apple's best value phone — all-day battery, great camera, same Apple Intelligence features. The main difference is screen size and camera count. For most people, the 17e does everything they need.

currentPromos.name: iPhone Air On Us (Switchers)
currentPromos.details: On Us when you switch on Experience Beyond or Better Value — no trade-in needed. Thinnest iPhone ever. Via 24 monthly bill credits.

currentPromos.name: Galaxy S26 Ultra On Us (New Line)
currentPromos.details: Free with new line on Experience Beyond ($100+/mo w/ AutoPay). No trade-in needed. Up to $1,300 via 24 monthly bill credits. $35 device connection charge. Max 4 devices/account.

commonObjections.response: A lot of our customers said that too — then they tried the S26 Ultra. The S Pen, the Nightography camera, Galaxy AI built in. But hey, iPhone 17 is On Us too if you switch. Either way, you win.

currentPromos.name: Galaxy S26 Ultra Up to $800 Off (Existing)
currentPromos.details: Existing customers: up to $800 off with add-a-line on Experience More or Better Value. Or trade-in on Experience More/Go5G Plus. Via 24 monthly bill credits. Max 2 devices/account.

currentPromos.name: Galaxy S26 Under $100 (New Line)
currentPromos.details: Galaxy S26 for under $100 when you add a line on Experience More ($85+/mo). No trade-in needed. Up to $800 via 24 monthly bill credits.

currentPromos.name: Pixel 10a + Pixel Buds 2a On Us
currentPromos.details: Both free with new line on most plans ($60+/mo w/ AutoPay). Pixel 10a via 24 monthly bill credits (up to $600). Pixel Buds 2a via instant discount — must be in same transaction. No trade-in needed.

commonObjections.objection: I've never used a Pixel before
commonObjections.response: Pixel is Google's own phone — you get AI features first, the best camera in this price range, and guaranteed updates for years. Plus you're getting the phone AND earbuds free. Zero risk to try it.

currentPromos.name: Galaxy Z Flip7 On Us (Trade-In)
currentPromos.details: On Us with any-condition trade-in on Experience Beyond. Any condition means cracked screens, old devices — doesn't matter.

commonObjections.response: Samsung has massively improved durability — Armor Aluminum frame and Gorilla Glass. Plus if you add Protection 360, you're covered for everything. And with any-condition trade, your old phone — even cracked — gets you this for free.

currentPromos.name: Galaxy Z Fold7 Up to $1,300 Off
currentPromos.details: Up to $1,300 off with new line on Experience Beyond. The ultimate productivity phone — tablet-sized screen that fits in your pocket.

currentPromos.name: Motorola razr On Us (New Line)
currentPromos.details: Motorola razr (Swarovski edition) On Us with new line on Experience Beyond. No trade-in needed. Also: razr+ 2025 On Us with new line on Experience or Better Value.

currentPromos.name: Home Internet Month On Us + Up to $300 Back
currentPromos.details: Use code MONTHONUS at checkout. Month On Us via one-time bill credit. Plus up to $300 back via virtual prepaid Mastercard ($100 Rely, $200 Amplified, $300 All-In). Digital activations only — not available in retail. Requires postpaid voice line + new internet line. Register prepaid card code within 30 days. Card expires in 6 months.

commonObjections.objection: I already have internet at home
commonObjections.response: What are you paying? Most cable companies charge $60-80 a month. Our All-In plan is $50/mo bundled with your phone plan — that's saving you $10-30 every month. Plus right now you get a month free AND up to $300 back. No contract, no data caps, 5-Year Price Guarantee.

We're the fastest 5G home internet according to Ookla Speedtest. Typical downloads 89-418 Mbps on our network. That handles 4K streaming, gaming, video calls — all at once. And the All-In plan comes with a mesh router for whole-home coverage.

commonObjections.objection: What if it doesn't work at my address?
commonObjections.response: Let's check right now — takes 10 seconds. And if you try it and it's not working for you, just return the gateway within 15 days. No risk.

currentPromos.name: Pay Off Your Phone — Up to $800/Line
currentPromos.details: Switch to T-Mobile and we'll pay off your current phone up to $800 per line. Via virtual prepaid Mastercard, typically within 15 days of rebate submission. Requires new financed phone, eligible trade-in, port-in, qualifying service. Submit proof of balance within 30 days. Up to 4 lines.

commonObjections.objection: I still owe money on my phone
commonObjections.response: That's exactly what this is for. We pay off up to $800 of what you owe, you get a new phone, and you're on a better network with better perks. It's literally designed to make switching painless.

currentPromos.name: Better Value Plan — Save $1,000+/Year
currentPromos.details: 3 lines for $140/mo (after AutoPay). Includes Netflix Standard w/ ads, Hulu, Apple TV+ at $3/mo, T-Satellite, unlimited premium data, 4K streaming, unlimited hotspot, $5/mo watch/tablet lines. 5-Year Price Guarantee. Upgrade every 2 years with same deals as new customers. $155/mo without AutoPay. Save over $1,000/year vs comparable AT&T/Verizon plans.

commonObjections.response: That's the sweet spot for families. But if it's just you, Experience More at $90/mo for a single line gives you a similar feature set. Or if you know someone thinking about switching, bring them along and you all save.

commonObjections.objection: How is it this cheap with all those perks?
commonObjections.response: T-Mobile bakes the perks into the plan instead of charging extra. AT&T just stripped all streaming from their plans. Verizon charges add-on fees. We include Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+ and more. That's over $30/month in streaming value alone.

currentPromos.name: FREE Same-Day Phone Delivery
currentPromos.details: New accounts get free same-day phone delivery (where available). Home Internet same-day delivery rolling out soon. Check availability at checkout.

planUpdates.change: New value-tier plan requires 3+ lines. $140/mo for 3 lines (w/ AutoPay). Includes Netflix Standard w/ ads, Hulu, Apple TV+ ($3/mo), T-Satellite, unlimited premium data, 4K UHD streaming, unlimited hotspot, $5/mo watch/tablet lines. Upgrade every 2 years with same deals as new customers. 5-Year Price Guarantee.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Better Value is the plan families have been asking for — everything included, $140 for 3 lines. That's $46.67/line with Netflix, Hulu, and T-Satellite built in.

planUpdates.change: Premium tier: $105/mo single line, $230/mo for 3 lines (before AutoPay). Best phone deals. Upgrade every YEAR. T-Satellite included. $170/mo for 3 lines with AutoPay discount. Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+ ($3/mo), unlimited hotspot, 4K streaming, $5 watch/tablet lines, 15GB high-speed international data in 215+ countries.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Experience Beyond is the premium play — best device deals, yearly upgrades, and T-Satellite connectivity even off-grid. If they want the absolute best, this is it.

planUpdates.change: Mid-tier: $90/mo single line, $185/mo for 3 lines (before AutoPay). Strong phone deals with trade-in. Upgrade every 2 years.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Experience More is the sweet spot for individuals or couples. $90 single line gets you premium data, streaming perks, and great trade-in deals.

planUpdates.change: Entry tier: $65/mo single line, $120/mo for 3 lines (before AutoPay). Basic unlimited with 5G access. Fewer device promos but iPhone 17e On Us qualifies.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Essentials works for budget-conscious customers who just need unlimited talk, text, and data. iPhone 17e On Us still works here.

planUpdates.change: $50/mo standalone or $30/mo bundled with voice line (w/ AutoPay). Fastest speeds, $300 back via prepaid card, Month On Us with code MONTHONUS. Includes mesh router for whole-home coverage, T-Mobile Tuesdays perks, premium 5G gateway.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: All-In is the one to push. $30/mo bundled, $300 back, month free. Comes with a mesh router so the Wi-Fi actually reaches every room. Fastest 5G home internet per Ookla.

planUpdates.change: $40/mo bundled with voice line (w/ AutoPay). Fast speeds, $200 back via prepaid card, Month On Us with code. High-performance gateway.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Amplified is for streamers and work-from-homers who want fast speeds without going all-in. $200 back and a free month.

planUpdates.change: $30/mo bundled with voice line (w/ AutoPay). $50/mo standalone. Affordable reliable internet, $100 back via prepaid card, Month On Us with code. May see slower speeds during congestion.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Rely is for light users or budget-conscious folks who just need reliable internet. $30/mo bundled is hard to beat.

planUpdates.change: Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fee at $4.49/line/month. Federal & local surcharges $0.36-$4.79/line vary by location.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: These are regulatory fees, not plan price changes. Your plan rate is locked under the 5-Year Price Guarantee. This applies to all carriers.

competitiveIntel.intel: AT&T launched Unlimited Your Way 2.0 — stripped ALL streaming perks from every plan. Zero Netflix, zero Max, zero Disney+. Customers have to pay full price for all streaming now.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: AT&T just removed every streaming perk from their plans. We include Netflix, Hulu, and Apple TV+ — that's about $30/month in streaming value they just took away from their customers.

competitiveIntel.intel: AT&T raising legacy plan prices AGAIN in April 2026 ($10-20/month increases). At least the 4th increase in about 2 years.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: AT&T is raising prices again this month. With our 5-Year Price Guarantee, that doesn't happen here. Your rate is locked.

competitiveIntel.intel: Verizon settled $100M class action over hidden Administrative & Telco Recovery Charge that grew from $0.40 to $3.78/line/month over time.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Verizon literally got sued for hiding fees that ballooned 9x. We're upfront about everything — and our 5-Year Price Guarantee locks your rate so there are no surprises.

competitiveIntel.intel: Verizon requires trade-in for most of their best phone deals. T-Mobile's top deals are no trade-in required for switchers.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Verizon makes you trade in your phone for their best deals. With us, you keep your old phone AND get the new one free. No trade-in needed.

competitiveIntel.intel: Most cable internet providers charge $60-80+/month with data caps, annual price increases, and equipment rental fees. Many require 1-2 year contracts.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: What are you paying for home internet? Most cable companies charge $60-80 a month with hidden fees and data caps. Our All-In is $30/mo bundled, no data caps, no contract, 5-Year Price Guarantee. Plus $300 back right now.

competitiveIntel.intel: T-Mobile families saved $3,700 vs AT&T and Verizon over the past 5 years (3+ lines, based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots Q3 2021 – Q4 2025).
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Based on actual customer bills — not marketing math — T-Mobile families save $3,700 over 5 years compared to AT&T and Verizon. That's real money.

competitiveIntel.intel: T-Mobile is the only carrier with T-Satellite (Starlink) connectivity — now powering apps like WhatsApp and AllTrails, not just texting.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: We're the only carrier where your phone works even with zero cell signal — via satellite. And it's not just texting anymore — WhatsApp, AllTrails, and more apps work through it. Nobody else has this.

competitiveIntel.intel: T-Mobile ranked fastest 5G home internet by Ookla Speedtest Intelligence (2H 2025). Typical download speeds 89-418 Mbps.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Independent speed tests confirm we're the fastest 5G home internet. Not our claim — Ookla's data.

knownIssues.issue: Bill credits may take up to 2 billing cycles to appear on all promo devices
knownIssues.workaround: Set expectations upfront: credits typically start on the 2nd bill. If missing after 2 full cycles, escalate to care for manual credit adjustment.

knownIssues.issue: 90-day cancel rule: Customers who cancelled lines in past 90 days may need to reactivate before qualifying for promos
knownIssues.workaround: Check account history. If they cancelled within 90 days, guide them to reactivate first, then apply the promo. This is a system requirement.

knownIssues.issue: Home Internet prepaid card takes up to 14 weeks from rebate submission
knownIssues.workaround: Set expectations: the $100-$300 prepaid card takes up to 14 weeks. They must register the code within 30 days of activation. Card expires in 6 months once issued.

knownIssues.issue: Home Internet credits stop if you cancel any lines or change plans
knownIssues.workaround: Critical: warn customers that the $20/mo bundle discount and any promotional credits stop if they cancel voice lines or switch plans. This catches people off guard.

knownIssues.issue: Better Value plan not available for 1 or 2 lines — minimum 3 lines required
knownIssues.workaround: For 1-2 line customers, steer to Experience More or Experience Beyond instead. Better Value is families only (3+ lines).

openers: What caught your eye today? No pressure — let's just explore what's out there.
Are you checking things out for yourself or for the whole family?
Have you seen any of the deals we're running right now? iPhone 17 is On Us for switchers — no trade-in.
discovery: What phone are you using right now?
What carrier are you on? Just curious what you're working with.
What matters most to you — price, the phone, coverage, or the extras like streaming?
keyMoves: Lead with iPhone 17 On Us or Galaxy S26 Ultra On Us — no trade-in needed for switchers
Mention the streaming perks: Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+ built in. AT&T just stripped all of theirs.
Drop the $3,700 savings stat: T-Mobile families save vs AT&T and Verizon over 5 years
Plant the Home Internet seed: 'Do you have cable internet at home? We can probably save you money there too.'
5-Year Price Guarantee — your rate is locked. AT&T is raising prices again this month.
closingTips: No pressure close: 'Let me save this for you so you have the numbers when you're ready.'
Urgency: 'The iPhone 17 On Us deal is limited time — I'd hate for you to miss it.'
Offer to check their address for Home Internet eligibility — takes 10 seconds
avoidMoves: Don't push hard — browsers need space to decide
Don't mention contract terms or bill credit math unless they ask
Don't overwhelm with too many promos — pick the one that fits their situation

openers: Let's get you set up! What are you looking to grab today?
Perfect timing — we've got some incredible deals right now. What do you have in mind?
Awesome! Do you already know what device you want, or want me to walk you through the best deal for you?
discovery: How many lines do you need?
Are you switching from another carrier? We can pay off your current phone up to $800.
Do you have a plan in mind, or want me to recommend one based on what you need?
keyMoves: Move quickly — they're ready. Don't over-explain.
For switchers: iPhone 17 On Us or Galaxy S26 Ultra On Us on Experience Beyond — no trade-in
For 3+ lines: Better Value at $140/mo is the slam dunk — everything included
Pitch Protection 360 before they ask about cases — easy add-on
Before checkout: 'Do you have internet at home? I can save you money there too — $30/mo bundled.'
Mention free same-day delivery if available
closingTips: Direct close: 'I can get you out of here in 15 minutes with everything set up and same-day delivery.'
Start the process immediately to build momentum — don't let them think too long
After device: pitch watch line ($5/mo) or tablet line ($5/mo)
avoidMoves: Don't slow them down with too many options
Don't skip the P360 pitch — it's easy commission
Don't forget Home Internet — ask EVERY customer

openers: Looking to upgrade or add someone to the account?
Great timing — we've got some solid deals for existing customers. What are you working with?
Are you adding a line for someone, or upgrading your own device?
discovery: What device are you on now? We can check your trade-in value.
Are you looking at the same brand, or open to switching?
What plan are you on? Let me see if there's a better option that unlocks bigger device deals.
keyMoves: Check trade-in value immediately — show them the math
If on old plan: compare to Experience More or Better Value. Old plans miss streaming perks and T-Satellite.
iPhone 17 On Us with trade on Experience More. Galaxy S26 Ultra up to $800 off with add-a-line.
Galaxy Z Flip7 On Us with any-condition trade on Experience Beyond
Pitch a connected device (watch $5/mo, tablet $5/mo) as a bundle add-on
ALWAYS ask about Home Internet: 'Who's your internet provider at home?'
closingTips: Show the side-by-side: current plan cost vs new plan with trade-in credits and streaming value
Any-condition trade: 'Even if your old phone is cracked, we'll take it.'
Home Internet: 'With your voice line, internet is only $30/mo. What are you paying your cable company?'
avoidMoves: Don't assume they want the same brand — ask
Don't skip the plan review — they might be on a retired plan paying more for less
Don't forget: Better Value requires 3+ lines. Don't pitch it to solo customers.

openers: Let me pull that up and get it sorted for you.
No worries — I deal with order stuff all day. What's going on?
I've got you. What's the order number or what are you seeing?
discovery: When did you place the order?
What's the status showing on your end?
Did you get a confirmation email or tracking number?
keyMoves: Resolve their issue FIRST — earn trust before pivoting
Set expectations on bill credits: up to 2 billing cycles to start appearing
After resolution: 'By the way, do you have internet at home? We've got a Month On Us deal right now.'
Check if they have a watch or tablet — pitch $5/mo connected device lines
If they're on an old plan, mention the upgrade opportunity with new plan perks
closingTips: Service-to-sales: 'All set on the order! Quick question — who's your home internet provider? I might be able to save you money.'
Home Internet: '$30/mo bundled with your phone plan, plus $300 back. Want me to check your address?'
avoidMoves: Don't pitch before resolving their issue
Don't make them feel like the support call was just a sales opportunity
Don't forget to set bill credit expectations if it's a new promo order

openers: Let's figure this out. What's going on with your device?
I deal with this stuff all day — we'll get it sorted.
No stress — tech issues happen. Walk me through what you're seeing.
discovery: Have you tried restarting the device?
keyMoves: Fix the issue first — build trust and gratitude
After fix: pivot to Protection 360 — 'This is exactly what P360 covers, plus $0 screen repairs'
Mention watch as backup connectivity: 'If your phone ever acts up, a watch with cellular means you're still connected'
Check if they have an old device — trade-in for iPhone 17 or Galaxy S26 might be On Us
ALWAYS ask about Home Internet: 'While I have you — who's your internet provider at home?'
closingTips: Gratitude pivot: 'Glad that's working! While I have you — are you using any kind of smartwatch or tracker?'
P360 pitch: 'If you had P360, this would be fully covered. Plus $0 screen repairs and JUMP! upgrades.'
Home Internet: 'Fastest 5G home internet, $30/mo bundled with your plan. Want me to check your address?'
avoidMoves: Don't rush the fix to get to the sale
Don't make them feel dumb about the tech issue
If they're frustrated, skip the sales pivot entirely

openers: Let me pull up your account and see what's going on.
No problem — what do you need help with on your account?
I've got you. What's the account question?
discovery: What specifically are you seeing on your account?
Is this about billing, plan changes, or something else?
How long have you been with T-Mobile?
keyMoves: Resolve their issue first
While in the account: look for missing connected devices, old plans, missing P360, no Home Internet
After resolution: 'I noticed you're on an older plan — the new plans include Netflix and Hulu at no extra cost.'
If 3+ lines: mention Better Value at $140/mo — could be a downgrade in price with an upgrade in perks
Home Internet pitch: 'With your voice line, Home Internet is only $30/month bundled. What are you paying your cable company?'
closingTips: Account review pivot: 'While I was in your account, I noticed a couple things that could save you money or add value — want to hear them?'
Home Internet: '$30/mo, no contract, 5-Year Price Guarantee, and right now you get a month free plus $300 back.'
If they've been loyal: 'You've been with us X years — you deserve the best deal. Let me show you what the new plans include.'
avoidMoves: Don't upsell if they're frustrated about a billing error — fix it first, then gently pivot
Don't assume they want to hear about new products if they're upset
Be careful with plan changes on accounts with active bill credits — changing plans can kill existing promos
